plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Software development workflow skills — ideate projects, design features, implement from plans, profile and optimize performance, refactor codebases with bold architectural reconceptions, extract patterns, design tests, and ship releases.

plugins.name: skill-authoring
plugins.description: Create, evaluate, and refine agent skills — write distributable reference skills for tools, refine skill ideas, and audit skill quality.

plugins.name: agile-workflow
plugins.description: Markdown-based work-tracking substrate for AI-driven projects. Sibling to workflow — items as files in .work/, late-binding releases, gates that produce items, autopilot queue runner.

plugins.name: ux-ui-design
plugins.description: HTML/CSS/JS mockup-first UI/UX design. Generate multi-option screen mockups, multi-page user flows, and design-system palettes as throwaway single-file mockups in .mockups/ for alignment before implementation. Loosely integrates with agile-workflow.

plugins.name: krometrail
plugins.description: Runtime debugging for AI agents — debug 10 languages via DAP, record and control Chrome via CDP.
